Catalog/ENT/OTSIKO Video Otoscope System
👂 ENT SolutionsREF: MRL-ENT-004

OTSIKO Video Otoscope System

OTSIKO · Capital Equipment

HD video otoscope with multiple scope sizes. 1280x720 resolution. Size matrix: 70mm/140mm/224mm/234mm scopes with 0/30/70 degree views.

MaterialMedical Device
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

HD video otoscope for visualization of ear canal and tympanic membrane. Portable and recordable with 32GB memory card and 5 probe tips included.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the OTSIKO Video Otoscope System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The OTSIKO Video Otoscope System is constructed using Medical Device, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
